PM-Kisan.benefit: ₹6,000 per year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 directly to bank account
PM-Kisan.eligibility: All small and marginal farmers with cultivable land. Family income below ₹2 lakh per year.
PM-Kisan.how_to_apply: Visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) or apply online at pmkisan.gov.in

Rythu Bandhu.benefit: ₹10,000 per acre per year (₹5,000 per season — Kharif and Rabi)
Rythu Bandhu.eligibility: All farmers who own agricultural land in Telangana. Tenant farmers not eligible.
Rythu Bandhu.how_to_apply: Automatic — if you have Pattadar Passbook, amount is credited directly. Visit MeeSeva if not received.

Rythu Bima.full_name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana — Telangana
Rythu Bima.benefit: Crop insurance covering losses due to natural disasters, pests, diseases. Premium paid by government.
Rythu Bima.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas. Both loanee and non-loanee farmers.
Rythu Bima.how_to_apply: Apply through bank, CSC, or insurance company before cutoff date each season.

Kisan Credit Card.benefit: Short-term crop loans at 4% interest rate (2% subvention + 2% prompt repayment). Credit limit based on land.
Kisan Credit Card.eligibility: All farmers, sharecroppers, tenant farmers, and self-help groups.
Kisan Credit Card.how_to_apply: Apply at any nationalized bank, cooperative bank, or Regional Rural Bank branch.

PM Fasal Bima.benefit: Insurance against crop losses. Premium: 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for horticulture. Rest paid by govt.
PM Fasal Bima.eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops.
PM Fasal Bima.how_to_apply: Apply through bank or CSC before deadline. Kharif deadline: July 31. Rabi deadline: December 31.

Micro Irrigation.full_name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana — Micro Irrigation
Micro Irrigation.benefit: 55% subsidy on drip irrigation for small farmers. 45% for others. Saves 40-50% water.
Micro Irrigation.eligibility: All farmers. Priority to small and marginal farmers with less than 2 hectares.
Micro Irrigation.how_to_apply: Apply at District Agriculture Office or through registered drip irrigation vendor.

Soil Health Card.benefit: Free soil testing every 2 years. Detailed report with crop-wise fertilizer recommendations.
Soil Health Card.how_to_apply: Contact nearest Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK) or District Agriculture Office.

RKVY.benefit: Grants for agricultural infrastructure, training, equipment, seed distribution
RKVY.how_to_apply: Apply through District Agriculture Office with project proposal.

Telangana Horticulture Scheme.benefit: 50-75% subsidy on seeds, plants, tools for horticulture crops. Free training.
Telangana Horticulture Scheme.eligibility: Farmers growing fruits and vegetables in Telangana.
Telangana Horticulture Scheme.how_to_apply: Contact District Horticulture Officer or nearest Horticulture department office.
